steps.title: Use the angle sum
steps.content: The triangle has a right angle, an angle of $24^\circ$, and the unknown angle $a$. The interior angles of a triangle sum to $180^\circ$.

steps.title: Find the missing angle
steps.content: Set up and solve: $$90^\circ+24^\circ+a=180^\circ$$ $$a=180^\circ-90^\circ-24^\circ=66^\circ$$ The answer is B.
